name_en: 【Celebrity Style】🔥Soft Nappa Lambskin Flamenco Purse New Handbag 👜The Flamenco Purse features a pleated design 💄 with key details like the iconic side knot. Stylish and versatile 😍, it can be carried as a clutch 🧸 or worn with the donut ⛓ chain strap or leather shoulder strap for a crossbody look. 👛This version is made of soft Nappa lambskin. *Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable adjustable leather strap *Removable donut chain with Anagram pebble engraving *Discreet magnetic closure *Suede lining * 🫶🏼LOE💋WE Gold or Silver Plating ❤️
name_cn:
